name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-oceanus

metadata.name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-oceanus
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Oceanus SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Oceanus SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-oceanus
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common oceanus
```

methods.name: tencentcloud.oceanus.v20190422.oceanus_client.OceanusClient.ModifyJob
documentation:
更新作业属性，仅允许以下3种操作，不支持组合操作：
(1) 更新作业名称
(2) 更新作业备注
(3) 更新作业最大并行度
变更前提：WorkerCuNum\<=MaxParallelism
如果MaxParallelism变小，不重启作业，待下一次重启生效
如果MaxParallelism变大，则要求入参RestartAllowed必须为True
假设作业运行状态，则先停止作业，再启动作业，中间状态丢失
假设作业暂停状态，则将作业更改为停止状态，中间状态丢失

```
param request

Request instance for ModifyJob.

type request



rtype

```

param _ClusterId: "\u5F53 ClusterType=2 \u65F6\uFF0C\u5FC5\u9009\uFF0C\u7528\u6765\

param _ClusterType: "\u96C6\u7FA4\u7684\u7C7B\u578B\uFF0C1 \u8868\u793A\u5171\u4EAB\

param _CuMem: "\u8BBE\u7F6E\u6BCF CU \u7684\u5185\u5B58\u89C4\u683C\uFF0C\u5355\u4F4D\
  \u4E3A GB\uFF0C\u652F\u6301 2\u30014\u30018\u300116\uFF08\u9700\u7533\u8BF7\u5F00\
  \u901A\u767D\u540D\u5355\u540E\u4F7F\u7528\uFF09\u3002\u9ED8\u8BA4\u4E3A 4\uFF0C\
  \u5373 1 CU \u5BF9\u5E94 4 GB \u7684\u8FD0\u884C\u5185\u5B58"
param _Description: "\u4F5C\u4E1A\u63CF\u8FF0"
param _FlinkVersion: "\u4F5C\u4E1A\u8FD0\u884C\u7684Flink\u7248\u672C"

  \uFF0C2 \u8868\u793A JAR \u4F5C\u4E1A"
param _Name: "\u4F5C\u4E1A\u540D\u79F0\uFF0C\u5141\u8BB8\u8F93\u5165\u957F\u5EA6\u5C0F\
  \u4E8E50\u4E2A\u5B57\u7B26\u7684\u4E2D\u6587\u3001\u82F1\u6587\u3001\u6570\u5B57\

  \u70B9\uFF09\uFF0C\u4E14\u7B26\u53F7\u5FC5\u987B\u534A\u89D2\u5B57\u7B26\u3002\u6CE8\
  \u610F\u4F5C\u4E1A\u540D\u4E0D\u80FD\u548C\u73B0\u6709\u4F5C\u4E1A\u540C\u540D"
param _Remark: "\u4F5C\u4E1A\u7684\u5907\u6CE8\u4FE1\u606F\uFF0C\u53EF\u4EE5\u968F\
  \u610F\u8BBE\u7F6E"
param _Tags: "\u4F5C\u4E1A\u6807\u7B7E"
param _WorkSpaceId: "\u5DE5\u4F5C\u7A7A\u95F4 SerialId"

type FlinkVersion: str

type JobType: int
type Name: str
type Remark: str
type Tags: list of Tag
type WorkSpaceId: str
---

methods.name: tencentcloud.oceanus.v20190422.models.CreateJobRequest.Name
documentation:
作业名称，允许输入长度小于50个字符的中文、英文、数字、-（横线）、\_（下划线）、.（点），且符号必须半角字符。注意作业名不能和现有作业同名
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.oceanus.v20190422.models.CreateJobRequest.JobType
documentation:
作业的类型，1 表示 SQL 作业，2 表示 JAR 作业
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.oceanus.v20190422.models.CreateJobRequest.ClusterType
documentation:
集群的类型，1 表示共享集群，2 表示独享集群
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.oceanus.v20190422.models.CreateJobRequest.ClusterId
documentation:
当 ClusterType=2 时，必选，用来指定该作业提交的独享集群 ID
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.oceanus.v20190422.models.CreateJobRequest.CuMem
documentation:
设置每 CU 的内存规格，单位为 GB，支持 2、4、8、16（需申请开通白名单后使用）。默认为 4，即 1 CU 对应 4 GB 的运行内存
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.oceanus.v20190422.models.CreateJobRequest.Remark
documentation:
作业的备注信息，可以随意设置
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.oceanus.v20190422.models.CreateJobRequest.FolderId
documentation:
作业名所属文件夹ID，根目录为"root"
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.oceanus.v20190422.models.CreateJobRequest.FlinkVersion
documentation:
作业运行的Flink版本
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.oceanus.v20190422.models.CreateJobRequest.WorkSpaceId
documentation:
工作空间 SerialId
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.oceanus.v20190422.models.CreateJobRequest.Tags
documentation:
作业标签
\:rtype: list of Tag

documentation:
作业描述
\:rtype: str
